conditions.critical_condition_basis: The solvent composition of 85:15v/v tetrahydrofuran (THF)/water, which represents the ‘critical’ ratio.
conditions.evidence_text: In gradient mode ‘critical’ conditions of separation of PEO (Heptane/methanol/ water) were initially adjusted. These conditions were shifted into LAC mode by adding a third, thermodynamically poor solvent (isopropanol.
conditions.corresponding_author_name: Steffen M. Weidner; Jana Falkenhagen; Sergey Maltsev; Volker Sauerland; Marian Rinken
conditions.physical_address: Federal Institute for Materials Research and Testing (BAM), Dept. I ‘Analytical Chemistry, Reference Materials’, Richard-Willstatter-Strasse 11, D-12489 Berlin, Germany; Bruker Daltonik GmbH, Fahrenheitstrasse 4, D-28359 Bremen, Germany; Dow Deutschland Anlagengesellschaft mbH, Buetzflether Sand, D-21683 Stade, Germany

conditions.critical_condition_basis: The solvent composition of 65:35v/v tetrahydrofuran (THF)/water, which represents the ‘critical’ ratio.
conditions.evidence_text: In gradient mode ‘critical’ conditions of separation of PEO (Heptane/methanol/ water) were initially adjusted. These conditions were shifted into LAC mode by adding a third, thermodynamically poor solvent (isopropanol.
